title.en: Cheshbon HaNefesh: The Jewish Practice of Daily Self-Reflection
title.he: חשבון הנפש: מנהג יהודי של התבוננות יומית
title.zh: 灵魂核算：犹太教的每日自我反思实践

description.en: An exploration of cheshbon hanefesh, the Jewish practice of daily self-reflection and spiritual accounting, rooted in the Mussar movement and applicable to modern life.
description.he: חקירה של חשבון הנפש, המנהג היהודי של התבוננות עצמית יומית וחשבון נפשי, ששורשיו בתנועת המוסר וחלים על החיים המודרניים.
description.zh: 探索灵魂核算，犹太教的每日自我反思和精神核算实践，植根于穆萨尔运动并适用于现代生活。

targetAudience.background: accessible to all Jewish learning levels

headerImage.prompt: A serene Chinese ink wash (水墨) landscape at dusk, featuring a solitary scholar seated on a stone platform overlooking a tranquil lake. The scholar holds an open scroll, engaged in contemplation. Mountains fade into mist in the background, while a single lantern provides gentle illumination in the foreground. The scene conveys introspection and quietude. Muted earth tones with soft blues and grays. Style: traditional shan shui (山水) painting with delicate brushwork. Mood: contemplative, peaceful, reflective.
headerImage.description: Scholar in contemplation at dusk by a lake

keyLearningObjectives: Understand the concept and history of cheshbon hanefesh
Learn practical steps for daily self-reflection
Develop a personal evening review practice
Apply Mussar principles to modern life
author: Torah Light Editorial
